Commands.Target: var API_BASE = 'https://nishinae.store'; var body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : ''; var re = /Order\s*ID\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9]{10,})/gi; var matches = []; var m; while ((m = re.exec(body)) !== null) { if (!matches.includes(m[1])) matches.push(m[1]); } var result = {count: matches.length, fetched: 0, shipped: 0}; if (matches.length === 0) { return 'NO_ORDERS_FOUND'; } var orders = []; for (var i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) { var sid = matches[i]; var idx = body.indexOf(sid, i === 0 ? 0 : body.indexOf(matches[i-1]) + 10); var section = body.substring(idx, Math.min(body.length, idx + 600)); var lines = section.split(/[\n\r]+/).map(function(l){ return l.trim(); }).filter(function(l){ return l.length > 3; }); var items = []; for (var j = 0; j < lines.length; j++) { var line = lines[j]; var qm = line.match(/^(.{10,}?)\s*x\s*(\d+)\s*$/i); if (qm && items.length === 0) { items.push({ productName: qm[1].trim(), quantity: parseInt(qm[2], 10) }); break; } } if (items.length === 0) { for (var k = 0; k < lines.length; k++) { var l2 = lines[k]; if (/zus|chagee|tealive|kfc|cbtl|gigi/i.test(l2.toLowerCase()) && l2.length > 10) { items.push({ productName: l2, quantity: 1 }); break; } } } orders.push({ shopeeOrderId: sid, items: items }); } var payload = JSON.stringify({ orders: orders }); function sleep(ms){ return new Promise(function(r){ setTimeout(r, ms); }); } function findShipLinkFor(oid){ var links = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, span, div'); for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) { var el = links[i]; var txt = (el.textContent || '').trim(); if (txt === 'Ship') { var parent = el.closest('tr, [class*="order"], [class*="row"], div'); if (parent && parent.textContent.includes(oid)) return el; } } return null; } function findModalShipButton(){ var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { var b = btns[i]; var t = (b.textContent || '').trim(); if (t === 'Ship' || t === 'Confirm' || t === 'OK') { var rect = b.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) { var cls = (b.className || '').toLowerCase(); if (cls.includes('primary') || cls.includes('red') || cls.includes('main') || b.closest('[class*="modal"], [class*="dialog"], [role="dialog"]')) return b; } } } return null; } return fetch(API_BASE + '/api/shopee/ingest', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: payload }).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(async function(apiRes){ result.fetched = apiRes.summary.created + apiRes.summary.duplicates; for (var i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) { var oid = matches[i]; var shipLink = findShipLinkFor(oid); if (!shipLink) continue; shipLink.click(); await sleep(1500); var modalBtn = findModalShipButton(); if (modalBtn) { modalBtn.click(); result.shipped++; await sleep(2000); } else { await sleep(500); } } return JSON.stringify(result); }).catch(function(e){ return 'ERROR: ' + e.message; });
Commands.Description: Fetch orders, POST to API, click Ship + confirm modal
